---
title: "Services"
page-layout: article
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

## Services

I provide research, advisory, and consulting support across lighting quality, glare, and visual comfort.

### Lighting Quality & Glare
- Discomfort glare evaluation and mitigation
- Luminance measurement and HDR workflows
- Visual comfort assessment for indoor/outdoor environments

### Data Analytics & Study Design
- Experimental design and protocol review
- Data analysis and interpretation
- Reporting for technical and non-technical audiences

### Standards & Committees
- Technical guidance for standards development
- Evidence synthesis and literature review
- Stakeholder alignment and documentation

If you'd like to discuss a project, please use the contact form on the Contact page.
